mapper.sql: select s.id, s.types, s.send_user, s.is_send, s.level, s.create_user, s.create_dept, s.create_time, s.update_user, s.update_time, s.tname, s.user_name, s.dept_id, d.name as dept_label from yn_wx_send s left join yn_wx_dept d on d.dept_id = s.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into yn_wx_send(id, types, send_user, is_send, level, create_user, create_dept, create_time, tname, user_name, dept_id) values(#{id}, #{types}, #{sendUser}, #{isSend}, #{level}, #{createUser}, #{createDept}, sysdate(), #{tname}, #{userName}, #{deptId})
mapper.delete: delete from yn_wx_send where id in #{id}
